channel.title: Nona Nenovska on EICP-LAB
channel.description: Recent content in Nona Nenovska on EICP-LAB

item.title: CRFVS Program
item.description: Prof. Yangsiyu Lu invited Prof. Nona Nenovska from the University of Amiens, France, to participate in an academic exchange through the university’s Cross-disciplinary Research Funding for Visiting Scholars program (CRFVS).

item.title: Academic Seminar
item.description: Professor Nona Nenovska from the University of Picardy Jules Verne was invited to give a seminar titled “Slavcho Zagorov (1898–1970): A Forgotten Pioneer of Energy and Ecological Economics.”
